summary: Recharts-based chart shell with design-token friendly container.

surface.descriptionText: Showing total visitors for the last 3 months

properties: Series data passed to Recharts primitives.
usageDo: Bind chart colors to Theme CSS variables.
Provide axis titles for screen readers.
Keep default margins readable on 360px width.
Export static snapshots for design reviews when needed.
usageDont: Do not encode secrets in chart data.
Do not disable animation without designer sign-off.
Do not mix arbitrary hex outside the token set.
Do not overload one chart with >5 series without legend.
